zh.lifeSummary: 當Edeline de Broc於1165年出生在英國素可時，她的父親Ranulf de Broc26歲，母親Damietta Goram20歲。她於1196年與Stephen de Thornham在英國英格蘭素可安莫林結婚。他們至少是7個女兒的父母。她去世於1221年4月29日之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edeline de Broc于1165年出生在英国素可时，她的父亲Ranulf de Broc26岁，母亲Damietta Goram20岁。她于1196年与Stephen de Thornham在英国英格兰素可安莫林结婚。他们至少是7个女儿的父母。她去世于1221年4月29日之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Broc
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Brose
meanings: German: from a vernacular short form of the Latin personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ). Compare Broce .

nameMeanings.name: Edeline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: diminutive of Adèle ( see Adele ), used occasionally in England from the early 16th century onwards, and now also found in the wider English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Edeline de Broc was born in 1165, in Sussex, England, her father, Ranulf de Broc, was 26 and her mother, Damietta Goram, was 20. She married Stephen de Thornham in 1196, in Angmering, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 daughters. She died after 29 April 1221.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edeline de Broc est née en 1165, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Ranulf de Broc, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Damietta Goram, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Stephen de Thornham en 1196, à Angmering, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 filles. Elle est décédée après 29 avril 1221.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edeline de Broc è nata il nel 1165 nel Sussex, England, sua padre, Ranulf de Broc, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Damietta Goram, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Stephen de Thornham nel 1196, nel Angmering, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figlie. Morì dopo il 29 aprile 1221.

ja.lifeSummary: Edeline de Brocが1165年にイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Ranulf de Brocは26歳，母Damietta Goramは20歳であった。1196年にイギリスイギリススセックスアングメリングでStephen de Thornhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1221年4月29日以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edeline de Broc(이)가 1165년 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ranulf de Broc(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Damietta Goram(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1196년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 앤그머잉에서 Stephen de Thornham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1221년 4월 29일 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edeline de Broc nasceu em 1165, em Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ranulf de Broc, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Damietta Goram, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Stephen de Thornham em 1196, em Angmering, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhas. Ela faleceu após 29 de abril de 1221.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edeline de Broc родилась в 1165 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Ranulf de Broc было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Damietta Goram, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Stephen de Thornham в 1196 г. в местности ангмиринг, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 дочерей. Она умерла после 29 апрель 1221 г.
